market_regime: Risk-on technology rally with Iran geopolitical premium; VIX 18.92 declining, QQQ +11.4% 20d, XLK leading at +15.4%

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner does not monitor same-day multi-executive insider cluster buys. Four executives buying $654K simultaneously on April 21 is a coordinated management bottom-call. Water AMI secular growth thesis is orthogonal to scanner's binary catalyst framework.

Scanner screens financial metrics and standard catalysts. Recognizing HII as a strategic monopoly (sole US nuclear aircraft carrier builder) and that the Iran war creates generational naval demand inflection requires geopolitical synthesis that quantitative screens cannot replicate.

Scanner typically favors drawdown setups. VRT was near 52W high and thus deprioritized despite a Q1 beat with orders +252% YoY, Americas +44%, and raised guidance — a transformational inflection the scanner's price-momentum filter missed.

Scanner focused on growth catalysts missed this income setup: 6.6% dividend yield with 24% coverage buffer, NNN inflation-linked leases, and 49.6% below fair value estimates at near 52W lows during a risk-on environment.

Devon-Coterra merger complexity and E&P post-integration dynamics are difficult for automated screens. The Iran geopolitical premium on oil combined with the merger creating the largest US E&P is a qualitative thesis requiring sector context.

Real-time unusual options flow (271% above average, 30:1 call-to-put, 20,272 contracts on single strike vs 4 prior OI) is a same-day intraday intelligence signal. Automated scanners run overnight and miss live market microstructure signals.

John Paulson's 39.9% stake via April 16 block trade requires monitoring activist SEC 13D filings and connecting gold ATH NPV re-rating to pre-revenue junior miners. No quantitative screen catches this multi-variable qualitative synthesis.

Discovery: John Paulson's fund filed an amended 13D on April 16 disclosing purchase of 4,913,665 shares in a block trade at $2.56/share ($12.6M), boosting its stake to 39.9%; Paulson has been buying consistently since 2013 and added again in January 2026; Livengood Gold Project in Alaska is one of North America's largest undeveloped gold deposits — a leveraged bet on gold with embedded optionality on antimony; note: market cap is well below $500M (~$30–40M estimated), making this a nano-cap exception flagged purely for the Paulson smart-money signal.
